title: Ralph-loop 2.0? The real autonomous coder is coming...
summary: AI Jason discusses advances in autonomous coding agents, featuring the /goal feature and /mission exploration for long-horizon task execution. The video covers practical setup and prompting techniques for AI-assisted development workflows using tools like Crewlet and Superdesign.
